fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact to which you have assigned this questionnaire.

fields.name: Answer
fields.tooltip: Specifies your contact's answer to the question.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company for which the contact works, if the contact is a person.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact to which you have assigned the questionnaire.

fields.name: Profile Questionnaire Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the questionnaire that the profile answer is linked to. There are five options: Very Low, Low, Normal, High, and Very High.

fields.name: Answer Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the profile answer. There are five options:

fields.name: Last Date Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the contact profile answer was last updated. This field shows the first date when the questions used to rate this contact has been given points.

fields.name: Questions Answered (%)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of questions in percentage of total questions that have scored points based on the question you used for your rating.
